publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 166, folios 167-168. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: Dearest L. I send you two powders;-- each containing [the next three lines are enclosed within a pair of large curly brackets] {Magnesia-- 20 grains Rhubarb-- 12 grains Ginger-- 2 1/2 grains}
I hope you found the bottle of Quinine. I remembered afterwards that it had been just opened once by me.-- I think you want
The Byrons will come on Monday, for 2 nights. At any rate he will.
On Weddy or Thursdy I rather propose to start for Ashley perhaps;-- unless reason occur against it meanwhile.--
I think I shall go over to lunch on Friday with you,-- if you
don't come here to sleep tomorrow or Friday.--
I also have some notion of sending the Housekeeper on Satdy to Ashley perhaps.--
I think my mother is doing pretty well.--
I am advised that a doctor ought to see Annab. & I think so too.--
her here to see Mr Colman who would do very well.--
I long to get to Ashley, if it be safe &c.
I am sick & weary of the life here,-- & I think it affects my spirits in reality a good deal, within myself;-- tho' it don't show externally.--
Of course I mean to go home on Monday.
